name: Cat Coffee Shop
author: Poki
description: Cat Coffee Shop is an idle/management game where you step into the paws of a cute cat and strive to run a bustling coffee shop! Begin with just one table and a single coffee machine, you get to establish and manage your own cozy coffee spot. Prepare drinks, tidy up tables, and collect money from your satisfied customers. Use your earnings to upgrade your café, recruit assistants, and enhance your skills! Meow, who has the best cat coffee shop in town? How to play Cat Coffee Shop? Move: WASD or arrow keys or click and drag Who created Cat Coffee Shop? Cat Coffee Shop is created by Lutte. Play their other games on Poki: Last Warriors ,! How can I play Cat Coffee Shop for free? You can play Cat Coffee Shop for free on Poki. Can I play Cat Coffee Shop on mobile devices and desktop? Cat Coffee Shop can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
